title: Phase 19 Next Cron Verification Plan

verification_checklist.how_to_verify: Read output file — should show 'Phase 19 — Autonomous Daily Growth Production Loop' header
Work reports saved with timestamps before delivery attempt
Delivery should be last step logged, not blocking earlier steps

failure_modes.cron_does_not_start: Check crontab -l and systemctl status cron. Verify dcba952b4c45 enabled=true.
failure_modes.wrong_prompt: Check output header — should say Phase 19 not Phase 15.
failure_modes.telegram_timeout_blocks_work: This is FIXED — work saves first. If still blocked, recheck prompt.
failure_modes.no_gsc_data: Run python3 scripts/gsc-daily-pipeline.py manually. Check token.
failure_modes.zero_work_done: Check output for 'no safe actions identified' vs actual execution.

post_run_verification_commands: cat .optimizer-data/gsc-api-truth-current.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['generated'], d['metrics_7d']['impressions'])"
cat .optimizer-data/phase19-daily-lock.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['work_status'], d['telegram_status'])"
cat .optimizer-data/phase19-execution-log.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d['runs']), 'runs, last:', d['runs'][-1]['date'])"
